name: Paper Polish
description: Iterative academic paper polish — visual layout, citation hygiene, structure consistency. PaperFit-inspired closed loop with Inspector → Diagnoser → Patcher → Gatekeeper. Degrades gracefully to text-only review when LaTeX / Poppler environment isn't available.

inputs.label: Paper (LaTeX .tex, PDF path, or pasted prose)
Target venue (CVPR / ICLR / NeurIPS / arXiv / generic)
Page budget (e.g. '8 pages + refs', leave empty for no limit)

gatekeeper.pass_criteria: Every A-tier (LAYOUT_CRITICAL) defect from the Inspector must be PATCHED or marked WONTFIX with justification. Every B-tier (FLOAT) defect should be PATCHED or WONTFIX. Citation completeness ≥ 95% (every \cite resolves to a bib entry, every figure / table has \label + matching \ref). If the environment is text-only (no LaTeX/Poppler available), A-tier visual defects waive automatically — the Judge only checks structural defects.
gatekeeper.label: Judge
